description: I managed to learn which characteristics of companies (if any) had an impact on the ROI they generated
I understood how the characteristics of companies relate to their ROIs
I know which characteristics of companies affected their ROIs, and in which direction
Subjective Learning Index: Mean of CouldLearn_1, CouldLearn_2, and CouldLearn_3, plus 3
Confidence in False Statements: Mean confidence rating that non-diagnostic attributes (Company Valuation, Number of Competitors, or Market Size) had an impact on ROI
Participant identifier (MTurk ID or Prolific ID)
